changes.manualAction: A Repository Administrator must separately review and apply an exact provider configuration requiring reviewed pull requests and designated checks while denying force-push and deletion.
changes.stopCondition: Stop before any provider change if the exact rule scope, bypass inventory, designated checks, or audit reference is incomplete or ambiguous.
changes.rollback: Restore only the immediately prior reviewed provider configuration and retain a fresh read-only observation; do not use a local file as proof.
changes.historicalInvariant: Do not create, move, delete, rename, replace, or rewrite Historical Tags or historical release assets.

changes.manualAction: A Repository Administrator must separately review and apply exact namespace rules that deny unauthorized creation and all update/deletion attempts for future Canonical Tags.
changes.stopCondition: Stop if the selected namespace overlaps Historical Tags, a bypass lacks principal, scope, custodian, justification, expiry, or audit surface, or provider behavior cannot be observed.
changes.rollback: Remove only the newly reviewed prospective rule after containment; never alter a Historical Tag as a test or rollback step.
changes.historicalInvariant: Do not create, move, delete, rename, replace, or rewrite Historical Tags or historical release assets.

changes.target: GitHub future-release immutability and privileged environments
changes.manualAction: A Repository Administrator must separately review prospective release immutability and target-isolated protected-environment settings; older mutable releases are historical exceptions, not remediation targets.
changes.stopCondition: Stop if required reviewer, self-review, bypass, wait, or target-isolation evidence is unavailable, broad, or mismatched.
changes.rollback: Contain by disabling the new prospective release path and retain fresh read-only evidence; do not replace historical release tags or assets.
changes.historicalInvariant: Do not create, move, delete, rename, replace, or rewrite Historical Tags or historical release assets.

nonEffects: This plan performs no provider write.
This plan does not authorize a release, Manifest approval, publication, deployment, tag operation, or credential change.
This plan does not make a baseline observation compliant.
